dash.no_data_hint: Import your Google Sheet data or record your first charge.
dash.rollback_title: Automatic rollback to the previous version
dash.update_available_hint: Click to update — opens the update section in settings.
dash.weather_no_home: Home location required for weather correlation.
edit.loc_click_map: Click on the map to set the location. Marker is draggable.
edit.loc_no_home: Home location not yet set in settings.
edit.loc_no_work: Work location not yet set in settings.
edit.location_name_ph: e.g. Aldi Berlin Mitte, Ionity A2 …
edit.title: Edit
flash.backfill_running: Backfill already running or no missing values.
flash.co2_backfill_started: CO₂ data is being loaded from ENTSO-E in the background...
flash.co2_fetched: CO₂ intensity automatically fetched from ENTSO-E: {value} g/kWh{hour}
flash.co2_loading: CO₂ data is being loaded in the background...
flash.entsoe_invalid: ENTSO-E API Key invalid or API unreachable.
flash.import_backup_made: A database backup was made first.
flash.import_replace_needs_confirm: Replace mode aborted: confirmation checkbox was not ticked. No data was changed.
hist.title: Charge History
input.loc_gps_unsupported: GPS not supported by this browser.
input.loc_no_home: Home location not set in settings yet.
input.loc_no_work: Work location not set in settings yet.
input.loc_not_https: GPS only works over HTTPS or localhost. Enable HTTPS in settings.
input.location_gps_title: Last GPS position reported by the car
input.loc_car_none: No GPS position from the car yet.
input.cancel_title: Discard entry and return to dashboard
input.location_name_ph: e.g. Aldi Berlin Mitte, Ionity A2 …
input.title: Record New Charge
login.footer: Tailscale protects the network, this page protects your data.
login.title: Sign in
logs.title: Live logs
maint.title: Maintenance Log
raw.kia_soh_hint: Kia/Hyundai report SoH against the reserved usable capacity — fresh batteries therefore often show >100% (e.g. 110–125%).
raw.list_desc: All vehicle sync snapshots retrieved from the car. Click a row to see every raw field from the manufacturer API.
raw.no_syncs: No vehicle syncs in the database yet. Press "Sync (Live)" on the dashboard to create a snapshot.
raw.normalized_title: Normalized fields (as stored in the app)
raw.soh_banner_body: This snapshot reports SoH above 100%. For Kia/Hyundai that is not a bug: the API measures against the factory-enabled usable capacity while the battery physically still has reserve capacity. The value falls toward 100% and below as the battery ages.
raw.title: Vehicle raw data
set.api_cached_gps_warning: In cached mode Kia/Hyundai usually returns no GPS position. For the driving log use "Smart" or "Live", or hit "Sync (Live)" manually.
set.api_desc: Connect your vehicle to automatically retrieve SoC, odometer, and charge status.
set.api_smart_hint: Outside the window no sync runs at all. 10 min × 16 h ≈ 96 API calls/day (limit 200).
set.api_token_desc: Kia/Hyundai does not allow password login. Click the button — a Chrome window opens (mobile mode). Log in and solve the reCAPTCHA. The token is saved automatically.
set.api_token_manual: Or enter token manually (e.g. from external script). Token is valid for approx. 1 year.
set.api_token_paste_desc: If the automatic fetch hangs: log in to Kia/Hyundai in your own browser (Mac/phone), copy the final URL with ?code=... from the address bar and paste it here.
set.api_token_paste_title: Manual fallback: paste URL containing code
set.app_install_confirm: Download and install the update now? The app will restart automatically.
set.app_install_timeout: Timeout waiting for restart. Please reload the browser or start the app manually.
set.app_install_wait: Please wait - the app is shutting down, files are being swapped and the app will restart.
set.app_not_found: Repository not found. Not yet published on GitHub.
set.app_restart_confirm: Restart the app now? The connection will be briefly interrupted.
set.app_restart_timeout: Timeout. Please reload the browser manually.
set.app_restart_wait: Please wait — the page will reload automatically once the app is back.
set.app_rollback_safety_hint: A backup is taken before every update. If the new version fails to come up, the previous one is restored automatically.
set.auth_desc: A login page with username and password shown before anyone sees the dashboard. Tailscale secures the network — this is the actual app login for anyone reaching you via tailnet sharing.
set.auth_disable_confirm: Really disable access protection? Anyone with network access will then be able to reach your data without a password.
set.backup_desc: Export the complete database (charges, settings, web login, trips, maintenance log) as a single .db file — or import an old backup back, e.g. when migrating to a new machine.
set.backup_export_desc: Downloads the current database as a .db file to your browser.
set.backup_import_confirm: Sure? The current database will be replaced by the uploaded backup.
set.backup_import_desc: Upload a previously exported .db file. The current database is safely backed up and then replaced by the uploaded one. The app will then restart automatically.
set.backup_import_warning: Warning: Importing overwrites ALL charges, settings and credentials with those from the backup. The web user and web password will change to whatever the backup contains!
set.co2_wtw_hint: Well-to-Wheel incl. extraction, refining, transport. EU avg: ~164 g/km
set.db_import_desc: Export Google Sheet as CSV (File → Download → .csv) and upload here.
set.db_import_mode_append_desc: Every row is inserted, even if date/hour/kWh are an exact match for an existing entry. Use only if you know what you're doing.
set.db_import_mode_replace_desc: Deletes all existing charges and imports the CSV. A DB backup is automatically written to data/backups/ first.
set.db_import_mode_skip: Skip duplicates (default — manual entries are protected)
set.db_import_mode_skip_desc: Rows whose date, hour and kWh already exist are skipped. Your manually added entries stay untouched.
set.db_import_mode_update: Update (fill empty fields of existing entries)
set.db_import_mode_update_desc: No duplicates are created; but if the CSV has fields that are empty in your existing entry (e.g. operator), they are filled in. Existing values are never overwritten.
set.db_import_preview_missing_fields: These app fields are not present in the CSV (will stay empty)
set.db_import_preview_no_file: Please select a CSV file first.
set.db_import_replace_confirm: Yes, I'm sure. All current charges may be deleted. (A backup is created automatically.)
set.db_import_replace_warning_body: Replace mode first DELETES all existing charges, then imports the CSV. Any entries you added manually afterwards will be GONE. Confirm only if this is really what you want.
set.loc_click_home: Click the map to set home.
set.loc_click_work: Click the map to set work.
set.loc_fav_click_to_reposition: Click the map now — new position for
set.loc_fav_add_title: Enter a name, then click the spot on the map
set.loc_fav_hint: Type name → click button → then the spot on the map.
set.loc_flow_step1: Enter coordinates directly, or click "Pick on map" and tap a spot on the map.
set.loc_flow_step3: Hit "Save" — matching events are reclassified automatically.
set.loc_status_idle: Click "Pick on map" then click the spot on the map.
set.locations_hint: Define home and work locations. These are auto-detected in the driving log.
set.notify_desc: Get a push notification on your phone as soon as your VM is waiting for the LUKS passphrase after a reboot. Uses the free ntfy.sh service — no account required.
set.notify_enabled_label: Notify me when the VM reboots
set.notify_howto: How it works: 1) Install the free "ntfy" app (iOS or Android). 2) Pick a hard-to-guess topic name below (e.g. ev-my-name-xK3p9q). 3) Subscribe to that exact topic in the app. 4) Save & send a test. Important: the topic name is your only secret — keep it private.
set.notify_server_hint: Default: https://ntfy.sh — only change this if you run your own ntfy server.
set.notify_topic_hint: Pick a unique, hard-to-guess name. Anyone who knows the name can read your notifications.
set.operators_custom_hint: One entry per line (or separated by commas). Built-ins are always available too.
set.operators_custom_ph:
e.g.
Local utility XY
Hotel Munich
City parking garage
set.operators_price_hint: Leave the price empty if it varies. It'll auto-fill the charge-entry form when you pick this operator (only while the price field is still empty).
set.operators_desc: Charging station operators with default prices. When you pick an operator on the charge-entry form, the matching price is filled in automatically.
set.ssl_hint: Enable HTTPS to use the app from your smartphone with GPS location and without "insecure" warnings. Self-signed is enough on a home network.
set.ssl_insecure_warn: ⚠ HTTP over LAN — smartphone GPS, auto-login and PWA features are disabled. Enable HTTPS below.
set.ssl_saved_restart: Saved. Restart required for it to take effect.
set.sysupd_desc: Automatically installs Debian security patches in the background (via unattended-upgrades). No feature upgrades — only security patches from the -security repository. You can manually check, install and reboot here.
set.sysupd_not_available: unattended-upgrades is not installed on this system. Please set up via paste block.
set.sysupd_reboot_alert: A reboot is required for some updates (e.g. kernel, libc) to take effect.
set.sysupd_reboot_confirm: Really reboot the VM now? You will need to enter the LUKS passphrase after boot before the app becomes reachable again.
set.sysupd_rebooting: Reboot running … page reloads in ~90 seconds.
set.sysupd_running: Running … this can take several minutes.
set.thg_desc: Annual payout for saved CO₂ emissions.
set.title: Settings
thg_reminder.body: Don't forget to submit your GHG quota for {year}.
thg_reminder.title: GHG Quota!
trips.backfill_title: Replay all vehicle syncs through the parking detection
trips.sdk_backfill_title: Pull the last 30 days of trips from the Kia/Hyundai server (no wake-up, no 12V drain)
trips.edit_click_map_from: Click the map now — position for start.
trips.edit_click_map_to: Click the map now — position for end.
trips.edit_map_hint: Drag markers or use "Pick on map" to set a new position. Blue = start, red = end.
trips.edit_derived_hint: km, SoC usage and regen are recalculated automatically from these values — no separate inputs needed.
trips.edit_confirm_old: This entry is older than 7 days — really change it?
trips.edit_requires_confirm: Please tick the confirmation for old entries.
trips.edit_age_note: This entry is {days} days old. Changes will retroactively affect km/SoC statistics.
trips.empty: No trips recorded yet. Recording starts as soon as the car parks at a new location.
trips.tb_backfill_confirm: Delete existing parking events and rebuild from sync history?
trips.tb_sdk_backfill_confirm: Load the last 30 days of trips from the Kia/Hyundai server? Server query only — the car will not be woken up.
trips.tb_sdk_quota_hit: daily API limit hit — rest tomorrow
trips.tb_synced_no_gps: Sync OK, but Kia did not return GPS. Car might be deep asleep.
trips.title: Driving Log
wiz.done_desc: Your passphrase and password are set. Your EV Tracker instance is now yours alone.
wiz.err_min_length: Passphrase must be at least 6 characters.
wiz.err_mismatch: New passphrase and confirmation do not match.
wiz.err_pw_min_length: Password must be at least 6 characters.
wiz.err_pw_mismatch: New password and confirmation do not match.
wiz.luks_hint: At least 6 characters. No recovery possible — write it down!
wiz.luks_warning: The LUKS passphrase protects your disk. If you forget it, your data is permanently gone — that is the point of encryption. Write it down in your password manager now.
wiz.password_desc: You normally do not need SSH — the app runs entirely in the browser. Still, set your own password here in case you ever need it for maintenance or troubleshooting. From now on, nobody else has terminal access to your VM.
wiz.password_hint: At least 6 characters. Will be set for the ev-tracker user.
wiz.weblogin_desc: You will sign in to the browser UI with this user. It protects the web interface from unwanted access. Editable later under Settings → Zugangsschutz.
wiz.weblogin_info: Remember these credentials — from now on they are the only way into your web UI.
wiz.welcome_desc: Your own EV Tracker instance has been set up. Before you start, two quick steps so the VM belongs entirely to you:
wiz.welcome_info: After both steps, nobody else — not even the admin who set up the VM — can access your data or log in.
wiz.welcome_step1: Set the LUKS disk passphrase (the one that protects encryption)
wiz.welcome_step1_luks: Pick a new LUKS passphrase for the encryption of your data.
wiz.welcome_step2_weblogin: Create a username + password for the web UI access.
